ideas.title: DateWeave
ideas.one_liner: Discover surprising connections between your dates and the moments that shaped the world.
ideas.key_insight: Existing birthday apps focus on individual trivia. The relational cross-date magic — connecting your dates to people and history — is the unique angle.
ideas.notes: Built as first test of the Claude → PushCraft → Vercel pipeline.
ideas.hero_description: Enter your birthday, add the people who matter, pick historical eras — and DateWeave weaves them together into surprising connections you never noticed.

ideas.title: PushCraft
ideas.one_liner: Push code from Claude to GitHub from your phone. No terminal required.
ideas.key_insight: GitHub API supports CORS for authenticated requests — no backend needed.
ideas.notes: v4: multi-file atomic commit, quick push, token persistence.
ideas.hero_description: The missing bridge between AI-generated code and production deployment. Scaffold, stage, push — all from your phone.

ideas.title: RepairShield
ideas.one_liner: Home repair triage for low-income homeowners and the nonprofits that help them.
ideas.key_insight: Habitat for Humanity Grand Traverse Region and Northwest Michigan Community Action Agency identified as local launch partners.
ideas.notes: Scored Unicorn. Prioritizes repairs, connects homeowners with assistance programs.
ideas.hero_description: Prioritizes which repairs matter most, connects homeowners with the right assistance programs, and helps nonprofits allocate limited repair budgets effectively.

ideas.title: Crisis Cascade Navigator
ideas.one_liner: Jurisdiction-aware action sequencer for people facing overlapping crises.
ideas.key_insight: When you lose your job AND face eviction AND need medical care, the order you act in matters.
ideas.notes: Highest impact score in the vault.
ideas.hero_description: When you lose your job AND face eviction AND need medical care — the order you act in matters. This tool sequences the right moves for your specific jurisdiction.

ideas.title: Shelf Life
ideas.one_liner: Predict which retail items will become future collectibles using anomaly detection.
ideas.key_insight: Manufacturing errors, rapid branding changes, recalls, and discontinuations all leave digital footprints.
ideas.notes: Quick-scored: interesting concept but unclear demand signal.
ideas.hero_description: Watches for manufacturing errors, rapid branding changes, recalls, and cultural moments that turn ordinary products into tomorrow's treasures.

ideas.title: TC Relocation Guide
ideas.one_liner: Hyperlocal housing intelligence for Traverse City.
ideas.key_insight: TC-specific buyer intelligence is the gap.
ideas.notes: Personal tool for summer 2026 move.

ideas.title: Map Mosaic
ideas.one_liner: Paint on a world map canvas using historical, artistic, and data maps.
ideas.key_insight: Leaflet.js or Mapbox GL JS recommended.
ideas.notes: Quick-scored: creative and novel but unclear demand.

ideas.title: Dice Party Game
ideas.one_liner: A party guessing game with 12 dice that constrain how you give clues.
ideas.key_insight: 12 dice covering communication mode, word restrictions, perspective, etc.
ideas.notes: Physical game concept.

ideas.title: Storyweaver
ideas.one_liner: AI-powered interactive fiction and collaborative storytelling platform.
ideas.key_insight: The interactive fiction space is extremely crowded.
ideas.notes: Deployed. Quick-scored: crowded space.
ideas.hero_description: AI-powered interactive fiction with procedural art, voice input, and 16 genre engines.

ideas.title: Shadowrun Story App
ideas.one_liner: Interactive narrative app set in the Shadowrun universe.
ideas.key_insight: IP licensing is a dealbreaker until resolved.
ideas.notes: Not scored — IP question must be answered first.

ideas.title: Arboreal Sentience (Sci-Fi Worldbuild)
ideas.one_liner: A story set on a planet where trees evolved to human-level intelligence.
ideas.key_insight: Five evolutionary pathways developed.
ideas.notes: Creative writing project.

ideas.title: Parking Incentive Inversion
ideas.one_liner: Credit patients who arrive early for appointments.
ideas.key_insight: Interesting concept but depends on institutional partnerships.
ideas.notes: IDF drafted. Correctly parked.

ideas.title: Bluetooth Busy Light
ideas.one_liner: Office availability indicator with separate controller and remote light.
ideas.key_insight: Luxafor Switch Pro is this exact product.
ideas.notes: Pass. Killed.

ideas.title: The Unsolvable Conversations
ideas.one_liner: An AI companion designed to hold philosophical questions open.
ideas.key_insight: Most AI products try to answer questions — this one deliberately doesn't.
ideas.notes: Quick-scored: impact close to threshold but not there.

ideas.title: Process Navigator
ideas.one_liner: Interactive branching flow editor for navigating real-world processes.
ideas.key_insight: No tool combines interactive branching with community content for everyday process navigation.
ideas.notes: Could be the platform layer for Crisis Cascade Navigator.
ideas.hero_description: Visual flow editor for building and sharing step-by-step processes.

ideas.title: The Grove
ideas.one_liner: Nature-themed portfolio site showing ideas at every stage of growth.
ideas.key_insight: Each idea's maturity depicted as a stage of plant growth.
ideas.notes: Portfolio site — scoring framework doesn't apply.

ideas.title: ShadowScale
ideas.one_liner: Tactical roguelike heist game in a cyberpunk-fantasy noir setting.
ideas.key_insight: Pure client-side browser game. Ship & Shelve track.
ideas.notes: Ship & Shelve track.

ideas.title: Traffic-Aware Road Repair Scheduler
ideas.one_liner: Optimize road repair scheduling using traffic pattern data.
ideas.key_insight: Best pivot was TMP Generator but effort too high.
ideas.notes: Killed.

ideas.title: Variant Forge
ideas.one_liner: Generate image variants using Gemini and Imagen 4.
ideas.key_insight: First tool built on Gemini/Imagen 4 API.
ideas.notes: Infrastructure tool for the pipeline.

ideas.title: Neon Sorcery RPG
ideas.one_liner: Cyberpunk-fantasy RPG with six-episode season structure.
ideas.key_insight: Single React component/PWA.
ideas.notes: Deployed to Netlify.

ideas.title: Colored Pencil Bandolier
ideas.one_liner: Wearable colored pencil organizer for artists.
ideas.key_insight: Scores too low. Existing products cover the space.
ideas.notes: Killed. Clear pass.

ideas.title: Stage Directions
ideas.one_liner: A self-help ebook using theatre concepts as the lens, written by AI with full disclosure.
ideas.key_insight: 14 theatre concepts mapped to life skills, 30+ human expert voices curated by Claude. Burkeman-influenced style.
ideas.notes: Published on Gumroad as pay-what-you-want. 14 chapters, ~11,700 words. Written by Claude, directed by Baylee Miller. Sustainability 96%: pure text, zero dependencies.
ideas.hero_description: 14 theatre concepts — from stage fright to improv — mapped to practical life skills. 30+ human experts. One honest AI.

ideas.title: Worldview Compass
ideas.one_liner: Comprehensive worldview/philosophy-of-life quiz with flower visualization.
ideas.key_insight: 6 domains, 20 axes, 60 questions. Flower visualization where petal shape/color represents worldview dimensions.
ideas.notes: React artifact v0.1 built. Track: Discovery.
